Best available short-term debt proxy on the balance sheet; appears to capture current interest-bearing borrowings, with leases shown separately in 'Current lease liabilities', so it aligns with baseline STD excluding leases.

Contains lease liabilities, which should be excluded from baseline STD.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the STD shortlist because it is the clean reported balance-sheet line for current interest-bearing debt. Excluded lease rows per instruction.
